titleStmt.title: SII 33.103: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 103. (A.R. No. 25 of 1948.) Sazzaladinne, Tadpatri Taluk, Anantapur District.

summary.p: Slab set up near the Āñjanēya temple.
This is dated Śaka 1466, Krōdhi, Karttika śu. 12 corresponding to 1544 A.D. October 27, Monday: 61.

Records the remission of taxes viz., Maṅgali, Sidāyam-kāṇike and Veṭṭi-virāḷamu in the village Penajaladina of Jagatāpi-gutti-durgam to Koṇḍōju, (a servant of the king) by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Alluḍu Rāmarāja. It is interesting to note that Alluḍu Rāmarāja was devoted to the feet of Lord Kṛishṇa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyuda
ya śālivāhaṇa śakavaruśaṁbulu 1466 A
gunēṭi krōdhi saṁvakṣara kā¨rtika su dha 12 lu śrīman ma
hārājādhirājarājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrasa
dasivadēvamahārāyalugāru vijayanagarāmaṁdu vajrasiṁ
hāsanaruḍhuḍai pṛthivīsāmrājyaṁ śēyacuṁnunuḍhagānu
sōmavaṁśādhīsvarulaina tyalaina paramadhā¨rmikulai
na śrīkṛṣṇapādaraviṁdadvaitaparulaina śrīmanamahāmaṁḍa
lēsvara Alluḍu rāmarājudēvamahārājulu gāru vēyiṁci
na silāsāsanaṁ roya kaligina maṁgaḍlapaṁnu sidayaṁ
kāṇike veṭinarokamunu rāyalu tamapanivojulu koṁḍōju
ku sa¨rvamānyaṁgānu pāliṁci viḍicināru . jagatāpi guttidu
¨rganiki celepena māgāṇiki cele penajaladina maṁgaḍlapaṁnu sida
yaṁveṭi virāḷaṁ sa¨rvamānyaṁgānu yistimi yiṁduku tappinavāru ku
kka māvusaṁ suragāḍida baḍukalu puṭṭinavāru magaḍa vāri koḍukulu .
Digital edition of SII 33.103 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
